channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox, 19th June
item.description:
Animals dead and needs to be picked up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 242, Chislehurst Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Memorial needs cleaning., 19th June
item.description:
Hi, This memorial needs cleaning. Please can this be escalated as I reported it last year

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-16, Market Square, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Substantial fallen tree branch blocking pavement, 19th June
item.description:
Tree branch totally blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Court, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 19th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finch Mews, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: 3 way Temporary traffic lights are out out the junction of st James way and the grove, 19th June
item.description:
The 3 way traffic lights are out, this is very dangerous as the is no room for two way traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Grove, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping—friendly suggestion, 19th June
item.description:
I have a friendly request/suggestion: please can your crews find an alternative location to pile Hackney rubbish sacks? It is an open invitation to flytip and litter. I had picked up the case of Ironbru + flatscreen tel box before taking the photo. Thx!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garnham Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 102 Grove Vale (Zebra crossing near Goose Green) broken glass, 19th June
item.description:
Broken Glass needs to be removed by zebra crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights stuck on red, 19th June
item.description:
All night long we have had cars beeping and being stuck at lights in both directions that have been put in place temporarily due to roadworks we urgently need somebody to come and look at the traffic lights to reset them or do something so that cars can actually know when to stop and when to go. A driver has actually got out of the car and now turned the lights sideways so that they are no longer being used. This is potentially an accident waiting to happen in addition to this all night long we are going to have Noise Pollution caused by people beeping their horns.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clerkenwell Road, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove (next to phone shop)-Bin overflowing with waste, 19th June
item.description:
The bin needs to be emptied as it is overflowing with waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 Melbourne Grove- Bin overflowing with waste, 19th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: 68 Lordship Lane-Litter Bin overflowing with waste(outside Screwfix) 2nd complaint, 19th June
item.description:
2nd complaint: The bin needs to be emptied asap. It is on a high street of high footfall and having the bins overflowing like this is a health and safety concern that needs prompt action.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-70, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip of furniture and rubbish, 19th June
item.description:
Pile getting larger as time passes. Spoke to neighbour who saw activity from window, but is unable to pin point exactly which property they were from.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duddington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Sign Missing, 19th June
item.description:
Road sign has been removed by the construction firm and placed in the driveway. Can we please request this is re instated ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Blackfen Road, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 19th June
item.description:
Someone has put a dead fox in a box and left it on the pavement - it’s already infested with flys and is creating a strong smell. It is on the pavement outside approximately 79 Median Rd. The box was first seen last night.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge mess, bikes in road causing obstruction and in residents parking bay please remove asap, 19th June
item.description:
Huge mess, bikes in road causing obstruction and in residents parking bay please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 19th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
